# tplinkeasysmart_port_pvid (Resource)

Manage the 802.1Q PVID for one switch port.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "tplinkeasysmart_port_pvid" "port2" {
  port_id = 2
  pvid    = 20
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `port_id` (Number) Physical switch port number.
- `pvid` (Number) Existing VLAN ID assigned as the port PVID. The VLAN must already exist on the switch.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Terraform resource identifier derived from port_id.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = tplinkeasysmart_port_pvid.port2
  id = "2"
}

resource "tplinkeasysmart_port_pvid" "port2" {
  port_id = 2
  pvid    = 20
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import tplinkeasysmart_port_pvid.port2 2
```
